title: podman network connect nonexistent-network fails with "pasta" is not supported: invalid network mode
body:
Rootless on main:
```console
$ bin/podman run -d --name testCtr quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 top
b5848f43c20807a92bd53fc8117c519b574e34a0a2d484059d5c9da77bafc3fe
$ bin/podman network connect nonexistent-network testCtr
Error: "pasta" is not supported: invalid network mode
```
Expected:
```
Error: unable to find network with name or ID nonexistent-network: network not found
```

comments.body: This has nothing to do with pasta and or slirp4netns, network connect is only supported for containers created with the bridge network mode. Create the container with `--network bridge` and it should work as expected.
